meta.title: Factory Integration Demo | Marek Rjelka
meta.description: Simulated factory line with OPC UA, MQTT, InfluxDB, and Grafana. Live demo of an industrial integration pipeline.

hero.label: Live Demo
hero.description: Simulated factory line with OPC UA Server, MQTT Event Bus, InfluxDB time series, and Grafana Monitoring. Completely containerized, one command to start.

items.name: OPC UA
items.desc: Industry standard protocol. Server models Printer, Scanner, Sensor, and Production Line as an information model.

items.name: MQTT
items.desc: Lightweight event bus. Machine data is published on topics and consumed by any subscriber (MES, PLC, Cloud).

items.name: REST / HTTP
items.desc: Control API for starting, stopping, and triggering error scenarios. Control Panel communicates via REST.

items.name: InfluxDB Flux
items.desc: Time series database. All OPC UA variables are written as data points and visualized in Grafana.

items.name: Docker Compose
items.desc: Six services, one command. Complete infrastructure containerized and reproducible.

items.name: Node.js + Python
items.desc: OPC UA Server and Data Bridge in Node.js, Control Panel in Python/FastAPI. Real-world combination.

items.title: OPC UA Information Model
items.desc: Realistic modeling of Printer, Scanner, Environmental Sensor, and Production Line with status variables and KPIs.

items.title: End-to-End Event Pipeline
items.desc: Printing, Scanning, Validating, Logging as an automatic, event-driven process.

items.title: Protocol Diversity
items.desc: OPC UA, MQTT, HTTP/REST, and InfluxDB Flux in an integrated architecture.

items.title: Live Monitoring
items.desc: Grafana dashboard with temperature, vibration, OEE, cycle time, and print/scan statistics.

items.title: Error Scenarios
items.desc: Manually triggerable faults with automatic recovery. Shows error handling under real conditions.

items.title: Containerized
items.desc: Complete infrastructure in Docker Compose. Reproducible, portable, production-ready.

footer.name: Dr.-Ing. Marek Rjelka
footer.title: Freelance Technical Lead | Industrial Software Integration
